text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So I just have to ask the quiz questions about
Tomakomai, right?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yup, I wanna practice until I can answer them all
at any time. I'm pretty sure I've got that page
down... Just need to check!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here we go—question one! Name three
Class B rivers that run through Tomakomai.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Nice job! Question two! In what year was Lake
Utonai designated as a national wildlife
sanctuary?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Exactly right! Question three! ...What's
Tomakomai's feng shui power spot?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Umm... Tarumaesan Shrine? It's an amazing
place—Mt. Tarumae's been enshrined as a sacred
mountain since long ago!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hang on a sec, I don't remember a question like
that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Sorry! I just figured I could get some quick
info that way!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So it's Tarumaesan Shrine, huh? I guess I know
where my next vacation will be. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: H-heeey! You're supposed to help me study!
